system.description: These flasks are always permanently sealed. When intentionally hurled at a location, they detonate to do 2d6 damage to all targets within 15’. The magic in the flasks ensures that they always hit the targeted point, provided it’s within 60’. Accidental breakage or breakage by an object is insufficient to trigger the magic, which requires human volition to catalyze it. Only one flask can be hurled at a time or the first to detonate will ruin the rest.
